keyPointsSummary: 'Should have' expresses regret — something that was the right thing to do but wasn't done

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम्हें उससे माफी मांगनी चाहिए थी।
quickQuiz.answer: You should have apologized to him.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसे ज्यादा मेहनत करनी चाहिए थी।
मुझे यह पहले बताना चाहिए था।
quickQuiz.answer: I should have told this earlier.

quickQuiz.hindi: हमें ज्यादा सावधान रहना चाहिए था।
quickQuiz.answer: We should have been more careful.

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम्हें उसकी बात सुननी चाहिए थी।
quickQuiz.answer: You should have listened to him.
She should have told the truth.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे यह किताब पढ़नी चाहिए थी।
quickQuiz.answer: I should have read this book.

quickQuiz.hindi: हमें समय पर पहुँचना चाहिए था।
quickQuiz.answer: We should have arrived on time.

quickQuiz.hindi: तुम्हें यह गलती नहीं करनी चाहिए थी।
quickQuiz.answer: You should not have made this mistake.

mustRememberRules: 'Should have' expresses regret — something that was the right thing to do but wasn't done
